code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test31-MAR-2017Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated serum creatinine, low total CO₂, and significant proteinuria with glycosuria and mild ketonuria, but no hematuria or leukocyturia. Urine is cloudy, brown, and has low specific gravity. These findings suggest impaired renal function, possibly acute or chronic kidney disease, with evidence of tubular dysfunction (glycosuria, proteinuria) but no clear signs of urinary tract infection. Further nephrological evaluation is recommended.

coding.display: Proteinuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus

Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
